queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account serves as a mitigating factor that decreases credit default probability in consumer lending portfolios.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: investigating the statistical relationship between negative checking account balances and their contribution to reduced credit risk exposure.
Credit risk drivers: an empirical analysis of how loan duration in months correlates with decreased default probabilities and enhanced portfolio stability.
